message:
feat(azure): build Azure connector with ARM, Blob Storage, and Key Vault

Full V3 FcpConnector for Azure: subscriptions, resource groups, resources,
blob storage (list/get/put containers and blobs), Key Vault (list/get/set
secrets). Bearer token auth, RetryLoop, doctor diagnostics. 56 tests.

Operations: list_subscriptions, list_resource_groups, list_resources,
blob_list_containers/list_blobs/get/put, keyvault_list/get/set_secret

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
 publish = false
-description = "FCP Azure connector for VMs, Storage, App Service, and Subscriptions"
+description = "FCP Azure connector for subscriptions, resource groups, blob storage, and Key Vault"
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "fcp-azure"
@@ -28,9 +28,8 @@ async-trait.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true

+percent-encoding.workspace = true

-chrono.workspace = true
